surface_verification.justification: Comment-only diff: two comment lines added to an existing importlib.import_module call site. No runtime code, no UI, no API, no serialization boundary is touched, so there is no surface to drive. Effect is verified directly by a semgrep before/after probe (1 finding -> 0, identical command) and by the standing security.yml scan on every push.

behaviors.behavior: The semgrep non-literal-import finding at _layer_coverage_regen.py:75 is suppressed (adjacency-correct nosemgrep attribution)
behaviors.evidence: Empirical RED->GREEN probe, identical command both runs: `semgrep --config r/python.lang.security.audit.non-literal-import.non-literal-import <file>` reported findings:1 line 75 before the edit and findings:0 errors:0 after it.

behaviors.behavior: Collector loader runtime behaviour is unchanged by the added comment lines
behaviors.evidence: 56 passed in the five shared/tests/test_layer_coverage*.py files; full F0 suite GREEN (18/18 units, 8416 unit + 234 integration).
